docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUELL, E. RICK AS TO DEFENDANT KITE, NEAL M.
HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUELL, E. RICK HEARING SET FOR NOV-21-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUELL, E. RICK SERVED OCT-23-1997, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KITE, NEAL M.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING FOR PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, CALENDAR OF NOV-21-1997, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NO OPPOSITION; PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE ORDER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KITE, NEAL M. $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,600.00, PLUS INTEREST & COSTS PER MEMORANDUM OF COSTS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BUELL, E. RICK
DECLARATION OF E. RICK BUELL OF ACCRUED INTEREST AFTER JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUELL, E. RICK
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KITE, NEAL M.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,732.55 AS TO DEFENDANT KITE, NEAL M.
